title: Out of the Snows
writer: E. Lord Corbett, Irvin J. Martin
actors: Ralph Ince, Zena Keefe, Pat Hartigan
plot: Robert Holliday, a member of the North West Mounted Police, is betrothed to orphaned seminary student Ruth Hardy. On the eve of her marriage, Ruth learns from John Blakeman that he and her father had been partners in the fur-smugg...
